PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?office WHERE {
  ?office wdt:P31 wd:Q40529 ; wdt:P131 wd:Q5659 ; rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(?label) , 'insurance commissioner'))
}
